api_key.description: Pexels API key, sent as the raw Authorization header value (no Bearer prefix). Never logged.

base_url.description: Pexels API base URL override for tests or proxies.

query.description: Search terms for the 'photos' and 'videos' streams (legacy defaults to 'people' when unset).

orientation.description: Optional photo/video orientation filter (landscape, portrait, square).

size.description: Optional minimum photo/video size filter (large, medium, small).
